item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 8min #BREAKING — SAUDI ARABIA’S PlF IS ‘ON THE VERGE’ OF CUTTING SUPPORT FOR LIV GOLF.
Report
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 8min #BREAKING — SAUDI ARABIA’S PlF IS ‘ON THE VERGE’ OF CUTTING SUPPORT FOR LIV GOLF.
Report says NO final decision has been made yet but an announcement on the league’s future could come as soon as Thursday, according to the @FinancialTimes citing sources familiar with the Mostrar más 0:15 14 25 126 12 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min The Financial Times says the Saudi PIF is on the verge of cutting support for LIV
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min The Financial Times says the Saudi PIF is on the verge of cutting support for LIV Golf and that an announcement on the kingdom's involvement with the league could come as soon as Thursday De ft.com 1 2 12 575

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min I think it’s fair to say there is lots of smoke but no one can confirm the f
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min I think it’s fair to say there is lots of smoke but no one can confirm the fire (sale). Yet. Cita Za @harp696969 · 52min En respuesta a @KVanValkenburg Do we have any news yet? All im seeing is the memes and talks about a meeting in NYC 4 1 42 5 mil

item.title:

Justin Thomas looks to defend hi
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 23min A clutch putt in a playoff for his first win in three years
Justin Thomas looks to defend his title this week @RBC_Heritage .
